Uses of Interface
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query.CassandraParameterAccessor

Packages that use CassandraParameterAccessor
Package
Description
org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query
Query derivation mechanism for Apache Cassandra specific repositories.

  • Uses of CassandraParameterAccessor in org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query

    Classes in org.springframework.data.cassandra.repository.query that implement CassandraParameterAccessor
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    CassandraParametersParameterAccessor
    Cassandra-specific ParameterAccessor exposing Cassandra types that are supported by the driver and parameter type.
    class 
    ConvertingParameterAccessor
    Custom ParameterAccessor that uses a CassandraConverter to convert parameters.

    Description
    protected abstract com.datastax.oss.driver.api.core.cql.SimpleStatement

    Creates a Statement using the given ParameterAccessor

    Creates a string query using the given ParameterAccessor
